debug_info.goal:
case refine_2
G : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Group G
K : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
A : Finset G
hA₀ : A.Nonempty
hA : ↑(A ^ 2).card ≤ K * ↑A.card
hK : 1 ≤ K
S : Finset G := {g ∈ A⁻¹ * A | ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op g • A ∩ A).card}
hS₁ : 1 ∈ S
hS₀ : S.Nonempty
hSA : S ⊆ A⁻¹ * A
hSsymm : S⁻¹ = S
hScard : ↑S.card ≤ K ^ 2 * ↑A.card
F : Finset G
hFA : F ⊆ A
hFcard : ↑F.card ≤ 2 * K
hASF : A ⊆ S * F
⊢ ↑(S ^ 2).card ≤ 16 * K ^ 12 * ↑A.card

failed_attempts:
have hASA : (#(A * S ^ 3 * A⁻¹) : ℝ) ≤ 8 * K ^ 11 * #A := sorry
    calc (#(S ^ 2) : ℝ)
        _ ≤ #(S ^ 3) := by
            exact_mod_cast card_le_card (by
              rw [show (3 : ℕ) = 2 + 1 from rfl, pow_add, pow_one]
              intro x hx
              exact mul_subset_mul_left (one_subset.mpr hS₁) (by simpa using hx))
        _ ≤ #(A * S ^ 3) := mod_cast card_le_card_mul_left hA₀
        _ ≤ #(A * S ^ 3 * A⁻¹) := mod_cast card_le_card_mul_right hA₀.inv
        _ ≤ 8 * K ^ 11 * #A := hASA
        _ ≤ 16 * K ^ 12 * #A := by
            have hK0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ K := by linarith
            nlinarith [pow_nonneg hK0 11,
              mul_nonneg (pow_nonneg hK0 11) (Nat.cast_nonneg (#A))]
